summary: Tested Picks and Tip flow for non-product service requests and Sign Out button. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Picks and Tip flow VERIFIED: /api/mira/os/understand-with-products correctly returns execution_type: CONCIERGE and ticket_id (e.g., CNC-20260209-0021) for service requests like 'I need a dog walker'
Vault Send to Concierge VERIFIED: /api/mira/vault/send-to-concierge creates ticket_id, notification_id, inbox_id for both 'picks' and 'booking' vault types
Sign Out button VERIFIED: Button has z-index: 999, visible, enabled, not covered by overlays, and successfully redirects to /login on both desktop and mobile
Admin notifications created for CONCIERGE tickets via central_signal_flow.create_signal()

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Sign Out works on desktop and mobile)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Picks and Tip flow tested - service requests (dog walker) route to CONCIERGE and create tickets. Vault types 'picks' and 'booking' tested via /api/mira/vault/send-to-concierge. Sign Out button works with z-index:999 fix applied. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_picks_tip_signout.py covers these flows.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working as expected
